# CWE-551 negative: path unescaped before authorization (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-551-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/url"
	"strings"
)

func AdminPathGate(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		raw := r.URL.Path
		clean, err := url.PathUnescape(raw)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "bad path", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		clean = strings.ReplaceAll(clean, "//", "/")
		if !strings.HasPrefix(clean, "/admin") {
			http.Error(w, "forbidden", http.StatusForbidden)
			return
		}
		r.URL.Path = clean
		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
	})
}
